g_codes_info.title: About G Codes
g_codes_info.description: G-codes are a standardized programming language used to control CNC machines (mills, lathes, 3D printers).
g_codes_info.how_it_works_content: Each line of code (called a block) instructs the machine what to do. The letter 'G' usually refers to motion geometry preparation (G-geometry), telling the machine whether to move in a straight line, along an arc, or perform a drilling cycle.
g_codes_info.structure_content:
A typical block consists of a letter and a numerical value:
• G01 – What to do (Linear motion)
• X10 Y20 – Where (Coordinates)
• F150 – How fast (Feedrate)
g_codes_info.modal_codes_content: Most G-codes are 'modal', meaning a command (e.g., G21 for millimeters) stays active until it is replaced by another command from the same group (e.g., G20 for inches).
g_codes_info.safety_tip: Tip: Always check the 'safe line' at the start of a program to ensure the machine is in the correct mode (units, plane, positioning).

descriptions.cutting_speed: Calculate cutting speed based on diameter and RPM
descriptions.spindle_rpm: Calculate RPM for material and tool
descriptions.tolerances: Calculate tolerances and fits for holes and shafts

gd_symbols.title: GD&T Symbols
gd_symbols.modal_p1: GD&T (Geometric Dimensioning and Tolerancing) is a system of symbols used to precisely define allowable deviations in shape, axis alignment, runout, and feature location on technical drawings.
gd_symbols.modal_p2: Unlike standard dimensional tolerances, GD&T controls the geometry of a part, which is crucial for correct assembly and machine operation. The system relies on datums, which establish reference points for measurements.

straightness.name: Straightness
straightness.description: Straightness tolerance - limited by parallel lines spaced by the tolerance value.

flatness.name: Flatness
flatness.description: Flatness tolerance - limited by two planes spaced by the tolerance value.

circularity.name: Circularity
circularity.description: Circularity tolerance - limited by two concentric circles, difference in radii = tolerance.

cylindricity.name: Cylindricity
cylindricity.description: Cylindricity tolerance - limited by two coaxial cylinders, difference in base radii = tolerance.

profile_line.name: Line Profile
profile_line.description: Line profile tolerance - limited by circles, difference in radii = tolerance.

profile_surface.name: Surface Profile
profile_surface.description: Surface profile tolerance - limited by larger and smaller spheres, difference in radii = tolerance.

perpendicularity.name: Perpendicularity
perpendicularity.description: Perpendicularity tolerance - zone limited by parallel planes, lines perpendicular to the datum.

angularity.name: Angularity
angularity.description: Angularity tolerance - zone limited by two planes at the nominal angle.

parallelism.name: Parallelism
parallelism.description: Parallelism tolerance - zone limited by parallel planes relative to the datum.

position.name: Position
position.description: Position tolerance - zone limited by a cylinder with diameter equal to tolerance value, center at nominal point.

concentricity.name: Concentricity
concentricity.description: Concentricity tolerance - zone limited by a cylinder, symmetry axis coincides with nominal.

symmetry.name: Symmetry
symmetry.description: Symmetry tolerance - zone limited by planes symmetrical to datum.

circular_runout.name: Circular Runout
circular_runout.description: Circular/axial runout tolerance - zone limited by two concentric circles.

total_runout.name: Total Runout
total_runout.description: Total runout tolerance - zone limited by two concentric cylinders.

datum_features.name: Baza pomiarowa
datum_features.description: Fizyczny element części (powierzchnia, otwór, wałek) używany do ustanowienia teoretycznie idealnej bazy odniesienia dla pomiarów.

tolerance.warning_it14_it16_min_size: IT14–IT16 tolerance classes should not be applied for nominal sizes ≤ 1 mm.
tolerance.info_missing_up_to_3mm: Standard does not provide data for nominal sizes up to 3 mm.
tolerance.info_symmetric_deviation: To avoid repeating the same values, '±x' notation is used: upper deviation es = +x, lower ei = -x.
tolerance.info_symmetric_js_replacement: When j5, j6, j7 are given as '±x', they are identical to js5, js6, js7 for that nominal size range.
tolerance.info_not_defined: ISO standard does not define deviations for this class in this size range.
tolerance.t_u_usage_note: Tolerance classes t5–t8 (inclusive) are not included for nominal sizes ≤ 24 mm; use u5–u8 instead.
tolerance.warning_vxy_max_size: Fundamental deviations v, x, y are not defined for nominal sizes above 500 mm.
tolerance.v_usage_note: Tolerance classes v5–v8 (inclusive) are not included for nominal sizes ≤ 14 mm; use x5–x8 instead.
tolerance.y_usage_note: Tolerance classes y6–y10 (inclusive) are not included for nominal sizes ≤ 18 mm; use z6–z10 instead.
tolerance.warning_ab_min_size: Fundamental deviations A and B should not be used for nominal sizes ≤ 1 mm.
tolerance.ef_usage_note: Intermediate deviation EF is mainly for precision mechanisms and watches. Other nominal sizes can use ISO 286-1 to calculate.
tolerance.fg_usage_note: Intermediate deviation FG is mainly for precision mechanisms and watches. Other nominal sizes can use ISO 286-1 to calculate.

gcodes.title: G Codes
gcodes.g00_desc: Tool moves at maximum machine speed without cutting.
gcodes.g01_desc: Cutting move in a straight line at specified feed F.
gcodes.g02_desc: Cutting move along an arc clockwise.
gcodes.g03_desc: Cutting move along an arc counterclockwise.
gcodes.g04_desc: Pause motion for a set time (P in ms or X in seconds).
gcodes.g17_desc: Select working plane X-Y (standard for mills).
gcodes.g18_desc: Select working plane X-Z (standard for lathes).
gcodes.g28_desc: Automatically return tool to machine reference point.
gcodes.g41_desc: Offset tool path to the left of contour.
gcodes.g42_desc: Offset tool path to the right of contour.
gcodes.g43_desc: Positive tool length compensation (uses H register).
gcodes.g90_desc: Coordinates are relative to part zero point.
gcodes.g91_desc: Coordinates are relative to current tool position.

mcodes.m06_desc: Automatically change tool to the number indicated by T.
mcodes.m30_desc: End program and return cursor to start.

converter.title: Unit Converter
converter.settings_hint: Uncheck units you don't use daily.

error.database_init: Błąd inicjalizacji bazy danych. Spróbuj zrestartować aplikację.
error.assets_missing: Nie udało się załadować wymaganych danych technicznych.
